title: Your Docs Are Written for Humans. Your Users Are Agents.
subtitle: Agents choose developer tools based on documentation quality. llms.txt is the new robots.txt. The MCP data proves it: repos with detailed docs get 18x the stars.
author: Graham Rowe
meta_description: Agent-native documentation: why agents choose tools based on docs, the llms.txt movement, and what the MCP ecosystem data reveals about doc quality and adoption.
